subcodes.first_line: O friends of the divine Lord! In this blessed age and auspicious century of the Ancient Beauty, whose manifest light illumineth the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حضرت یزدان در این عصر مبارک و قرن فرخ جمال قدم که نور مبینش آفاق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for unity, @unity in diversity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
